fawe.tips.tip.sel.list: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: See the different selection modes with <#478FC6>//sel list
fawe.tips.tip.select.connected: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: Select all connected blocks with <#478FC6>//sel fuzzy
fawe.tips.tip.set.pos1: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: Use pos1 as a pattern with <#478FC6>//set pos1
fawe.tips.tip.fast: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: Set fast and without undo using <#478FC6>//fast
fawe.tips.tip.cancel: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: You can <#478FC6>//cancel<#C2C7D3> an edit in progress

fawe.tips.tip.mask.angle: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: Replace upward slopes of 3-20 blocks using <#478FC6>//replace /[-20][-3] bedrock

fawe.tips.tip.replace.id: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: Replace only the block id: <#478FC6>//replace woodenstair <#D1968C>#id[cobblestair]
fawe.tips.tip.tab.complete: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: The replace command supports tab completion
fawe.tips.tip.replace.marker: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Tip: Replace a block with your full clipboard using <#478FC6>//replace wool <#D1968C>#fullcopy

worldedit.brush.apply.description: Apply brush, apply a function to every block
worldedit.brush.apply.item.warning: <prefix><#D1968C>This brush simulates item usages. Its effects may not work on all platforms, may not be undo-able, and may cause strange interactions with other mods/plugins. Use at your own risk.

worldedit.brush.paint.item.warning: <prefix><#D1968C>This brush simulates item usages. Its effects may not work on all platforms, may not be undo-able, and may cause strange interactions with other mods/plugins. Use at your own risk.

worldedit.brush.none.equipped: <prefix><#C2C7D3>You have no brush bound to your current item. Try <#478FC6>/brush sphere<#C2C7D3> for a basic brush.
worldedit.setbiome.changed: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Biomes were changed in <#FDFDFC><arg0><#C2C7D3> columns. You may have to rejoin your game (or close and reopen your world) to see a change.

worldedit.setbiome.not-locatable: <prefix><#D1968C>Command sender must be present in the world to use the <#D1968C>-p<#CE5F4E> flag.
worldedit.drawsel.enabled: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Server CUI enabled. This only supports cuboid regions, with a maximum size of <#D1968C><arg0>x<#D1968C><arg1>x<#D1968C><arg2>.

worldedit.fast.enabled: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Fast mode enabled. Changes won't be written to history (<#478FC6>//undo<#C2C7D3> is disabled). Lighting in the affected chunks may be wrong and/or you may need to rejoin to see changes.
worldedit.toggleplace.player: <prefix><#C2C7D3>Now placing at the block you stand in.

worldedit.wand.selwand.now.tool: <prefix><#C2C7D3>The selection wand is now a normal tool. You can disable it with <#D1968C><arg0><#C2C7D3> and rebind it to any item with <#D1968C><arg1><#C2C7D3> or get a new wand with <#D1968C><arg2>.

worldedit.version.bukkit.unsupported-ada:
<prefix><#CE5F4E>This FastAsyncWorldEdit version does not fully support your version of Bukkit. Block entities (e.g. chests) will be empty, block properties (e.g. rotation) will be missing, and other things may not work. Update FastAsyncWorldEdit to restore this functionality:
<#D1968C><arg0>
